title: Godox V100-S 100Ws Touchscreen Camera Flash Speedlite for Sony, Detachable Sub Flash, USB-C Charge Battery, 2.4G X Wireless HSS TTL Flash for Sony a7IV a7III a7RV a7RIV a7c a9III a6500 a6400
features: Cameras with TTL autoflash. Compatible with Sony α77II, α99, α77, DSC-RX10, α7R, α6000, α6400, α6500, α7RII(4.0), α7RIII, α7M3, α9, α7RIV, α7RV, α7MIV, ZV-E10, A9III, A7C
100Ws Maximum Power Output: The Godox V100-S is a high-performance TTL Li-ion Round Head Camera Flash with an impressive 100Ws power output, setting a new standard for on-camera flash capabilities
70 Full-Power Consecutive Flash: With an advanced cooling system, the V100-S can deliver 70 to 100 consecutive full-power flashes at 100Ws, ensuring high shooting efficiency and flexibility

Advanced Touchscreen Interface: Featuring a 2.3-inch full-color, high-sensitivity touchscreen, the V100-S offers an intuitive and responsive control system for quick adjustments and efficient workflow

Detachable Sub Flash for Versatility: The V100-S includes a detachable sub flash (SU-1), allowing for dual-light setups and creative lighting solutions. This feature is particularly useful for portrait photographers looking to add depth and dimension to their work

Multiple charging methods: Powered by a high-performance lithium battery, the V100-S ensures uninterrupted shooting. With a Type-C charging port and compatibility with the VC26T Multi-Battery Charger(sold separately), recharging is quick and convenient
Global Shutter Compatibility: The V100-S is designed to work seamlessly with cameras that have global shutter technology, such as the Sony a9 II, allowing for high-speed sync up to 1/80,000 seconds
